creator: Meyser+bugs.freebsd.org@xenet.de
text:
fdesc ist mountest the "right way".

as I said the same problem with ftpd inside jail.

This problem ist bridge(host) an epair (jail) related.

If ipfw ist loaded on host an inside
jail both in "OPEN" mode the problem rises.

to fix one have to set "net.link.bridge.ipfw=1" on host.
